title: NGC 5128 Centaurus-A
alt: This ultraviolet image from NASA Galaxy Evolution Explorer is of NGC 5128 Centaurus-A. This unusual galaxy is believed to be the result of a collision of two normal galaxies.
license: Review the source page. NASA content is generally available under NASA media usage guidelines, but third-party material may have separate rights.
